policy_statement: Miami-Dade County will cut communitywide greenhouse gas emissions 50% by 2030 from 2019 levels, and achieve net zero by 2050.
verbatim_text:
this plan describes work taking place on multiple fronts to cut MiamiDade's greenhouse gas emissions 50 percent by 2030 from 2019 levels,  with  the  goal  of  achieving  net  zero  by  2050.

This pledge is mobilizing communities to swiftly enact measures to reduce GHG emissions 50% by 2030 compared to 2019 levels and then progress forward to achieve net zero by 2050.
has_binding_mechanism: No (County commitment / pledge; not presented as a legally binding ordinance in the excerpt)
extraction_rationale: Clear, numerical community target and repeated as the Strategy's core goal (quantifiable target). It is a stated County commitment (Race to Zero pledge) and frames the Strategy.
weak_signals: pledge; mobilizing communities; goal; plan describes work; swiftly enact measures (aspirational/process language)
strong_signals: 50% by 2030; from 2019 levels (baseline); net zero by 2050; Miami‑Dade County; communitywide (spatial specificity); explicit dates and percentage

policy_statement: Retune 1.1 billion square feet of communitywide buildings by 2030.
verbatim_text: RETUNE 1.1 BILLION SQUARE FOOTAGE OF COMMUNITY WIDE BUILDINGS BY 2030
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — Retune 1.1 billion sq ft by 2030
has_binding_mechanism: No (target stated; the text elsewhere recommends an ordinance, but this line is a target)
extraction_rationale: Explicit numerical target for retuning (quantifiable target and specific intervention).
weak_signals: No legal/regulatory mandate in this line; no baseline or definition of "retune"; missing implementation/enforcement details
strong_signals: "1.1 billion square feet"; "by 2030"; "communitywide" (Miami‑Dade); actionable verb "retune" (building systems optimization)
